subcodes.first_line: Say: The utterance is as the earth, and trustworthiness is as its water. Blessed is he who holdeth fast unto it and pondereth upon that which hath been revealed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل ان البیان ارض و الامانه هی مائها طوبی لمن تمسک بها و یتفکر فیما نزل من
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital
